commands.command: three consecutive executions of ./scripts/verify-playgodot.sh with the pinned GODOT_BIN

failure_history.failure: The first three-platform run depended on rg, which is not installed on hosted runners by default.
failure_history.recovery: Replaced the runner dependency with git grep and portable grep; run 29486213624 passed all three platforms.

failure_history.failure: macOS exposed connection resets and refusals during session cleanup and process output handling.
failure_history.recovery: Added deterministic cleanup retries, process-output draining, and isolated the semantic fixture from world startup.

failure_history.failure: The isolated production HUD was initially blank, creating a degenerate one-pixel semantic screenshot on macOS and Windows.
failure_history.recovery: Populated the real HUD fixture with 60 MPH state and asserted meaningful text and bounds.

failure_history.failure: The macOS hosted VM correctly exceeded the production 40 ms first-frame chunk-build budget inside the listener-absence boundary.
failure_history.recovery: Separated the listener assertion from the exact typed budget exit while keeping all other startup failures fatal.

recovery_result.result: all five jobs passed; PlayGodot passed on Linux, macOS, and Windows and M0 passed on Linux and Windows
